/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/PhysicsSim.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/PhysicsSim.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PhysicsSim.dir/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/PhysicsSim.dir/graphics/CircleRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PhysicsSim.dir/space/Newtonian.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PhysicsSim.dir/space/Relativistic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PhysicsSim.dir/universe/PipelineUniverse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PhysicsSim.dir/universe/StandardUniverse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PhysicsSim.dir/universe/steps/EulerStep.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PhysicsSim.dir/universe/steps/MergingStep.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PhysicsSim.dir/universe/steps/RK4Step.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PhysicsSim.dir/universe/steps/TrailStep.cpp.o -o PhysicsSim  _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a -lpthread -ldl /usr/lib/librt.a -lm /usr/lib/libX11.so /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so -ldl
